summary: The AI agent failed to properly engage with the patient and abruptly ended the call without addressing the rescheduling request.

issues.title: Abrupt Call Termination
issues.details: The agent ended the call immediately after the patient provided their name and request to reschedule, which is a failure to fulfill the task of rescheduling an appointment.
issues.expected: The agent should have acknowledged the patient's request to reschedule and proceeded to negotiate a new time slot.
